title: Replace hero background with uploaded Querétaro aqueduct image

requirements.text: Save the uploaded image (new-qro-main.jpeg) as the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg and use it as the background image in the HeroSection component, replacing the current background image. The image should cover the full viewport with object-fit cover and be centered.

quotes: favor de usar la imagen como fondo principal

acceptanceCriteria: The file new-qro-main.jpeg is placed at frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg
HeroSection renders the new Querétaro aqueduct image as its full-screen background
The image covers the entire hero area (background-size: cover, background-position: center)
No previous background image is referenced in HeroSection

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Only the hero section background image should change — no other layout or style changes
nonGoals: Adding overlay effects unless already present in the current HeroSection implementation

edits: Use the uploaded file as-is, saved to the project as (new-qro-main.jpeg)
